name: NUTTER-XMD
description: NUTTER-XMD — A powerful WhatsApp multi-device bot. Deploy your own instance.

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session ID. Get this from the pairing page at the bot owner's website.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp phone number in international format (e.g. 254712345678). This is the number that will be the bot owner.

BOT_NAME.description: The name your bot will display.

PREFIX.description: The command prefix character (e.g. . or !). Default is dot (.).

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub personal access token (optional but strongly recommended for the admin fork list). Without it the GitHub API is rate-limited to 60 requests/hour on shared Heroku IPs, which causes the admin dashboard to fail. Create one at github.com/settings/tokens — no special scopes needed for public repos.
